name: Shortbread Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add sifted flour, cornstarch, and salt. Mix well.
3. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and knead lightly.
4. Divide in half. Shape into 2 rolls about 1 1/2 inches wide and 6 inches long.
5. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour or until firm.
6. Cut into 1/4 inch slices.
7. Place on oven trays.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes, or until cooked.
